description:
Analyze the 'grid_voltage' feed (tag: 'mains') for the last 24 hours to identify over-voltage events, defined as any reading strictly greater than 253.0 Volts. Generate a JSON report saved to '~/voltage_quality_report.json' with the following structure:

{
  "feed_name": "grid_voltage",
  "threshold_volts": 253.0,
  "total_samples_analyzed": <integer>,
  "samples_over_threshold": <integer>,
  "minutes_over_threshold": <float>,
  "max_observed_voltage": <float>
}

Calculate 'minutes_over_threshold' based on the 10-second feed interval.
